
At a Glance
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Spawning Biomass, Recruitment, and Harvest Rate

```{r at_a_glance_stack}
sb        <- mv$spawning_biomass
sb_stks   <- if ("stock" %in% names(sb) && length(unique(sb$stock)) > 1L) unique(sb$stock) else NULL
rec       <- mv$recruitment
rec_stks  <- if ("stock" %in% names(rec) && length(unique(rec$stock)) > 1L) unique(rec$stock) else NULL
hr        <- mv$harvest_rate
if (is.null(hr)) hr <- mv$legal_hr
hr_label  <- if (!is.null(meta$hr_label)) meta$hr_label else "Harvest rate"
stock_pal <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd")

hr_shapes <- list()
if (has_refpts && !is.null(mv$ref_points$lUmsy))
  hr_shapes <- list(list(type = "line",
    x0 = min(years), x1 = max(years),
    y0 = mv$ref_points$lUmsy, y1 = mv$ref_points$lUmsy,
    line = list(color = "#999999", width = 1.5, dash = "dash")))

# --- Panel builders (stk=NULL → use all rows, single-stock path) ---
.glance_sb <- function(stk, si, show_label) {
  sub <- if (!is.null(stk)) sb[sb$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE] else sb
  sub <- sub[order(sub$year), , drop=FALSE]
  col <- stock_pal[((si - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
  lbl <- if (!is.null(stk)) stk else "Spawning biomass"
  p   <- plot_ly()
  if ("lwr" %in% names(sub) && any(!is.na(sub$lwr)))
    p <- add_ribbons(p=p, x=sub$year, ymin=sub$lwr, ymax=sub$upr,
      line=list(width=0), fillcolor="rgba(31,119,180,0.2)",
      showlegend=FALSE, hoverinfo="skip")
  p <- add_lines(p=p, x=sub$year, y=sub$est,
    line=list(color=col, width=2), name=lbl, showlegend=is.null(stk),
    hovertemplate=paste0(lbl, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
  # Legal (fishable) biomass — siscaL only
  if (!is.null(meta$model_type) && meta$model_type == "siscaL" &&
      !is.null(mv$legal_biomass)) {
    lb   <- mv$legal_biomass
    lb_s <- if (!is.null(stk) && "stock" %in% names(lb))
              lb[lb$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE] else lb
    lb_s <- lb_s[order(lb_s$year), , drop=FALSE]
    if (nrow(lb_s) > 0)
      p <- add_lines(p=p, x=lb_s$year, y=lb_s$est,
        line=list(color=col, width=2, dash="dash"),
        name="Legal (fishable)", legendgroup="Legal",
        showlegend=(is.null(stk) || si == 1L),
        hovertemplate="Legal %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  }
  if (!is.null(mv$vulnerable_biomass) && !is.null(mv$index_fits)) {
    sc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names=survey_fleets)
    for (sf in survey_fleets) {
      idx_sf <- mv$index_fits[mv$index_fits$fleet == sf & !is.na(mv$index_fits$obs), , drop=FALSE]
      if (!is.null(stk) && "stock" %in% names(idx_sf))
        idx_sf <- idx_sf[idx_sf$stock == stk, , drop=FALSE]
      vb_sf <- mv$vulnerable_biomass[mv$vulnerable_biomass$fleet == sf, , drop=FALSE]
      if (nrow(idx_sf)==0 || nrow(vb_sf)==0) next
      merged <- merge(idx_sf[, c("year","obs")], vb_sf[, c("year","est")], by="year")
      merged <- merged[merged$obs > 0, , drop=FALSE]
      if (nrow(merged)==0) next
      q_hat <- mean(merged$obs / merged$est, na.rm=TRUE)
      p <- add_markers(p=p, x=idx_sf$year, y=idx_sf$obs / q_hat,
        name=sf, legendgroup=sf,
        showlegend=is.null(stk) || (si == 1L),
        marker=list(color=sc[sf], size=5, line=list(color="white", width=0.5)),
        hovertemplate=paste0(sf, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
    }
  }
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  if (show_label && !is.null(stk)) lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label=stk))
  lay$yaxis$title     <- "Spawn. B"
  lay$yaxis$rangemode <- "tozero"
  do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
}

.glance_rec <- function(stk, si) {
  sub <- if (!is.null(stk) && stk %in% rec$stock) rec[rec$stock==stk, , drop=FALSE]
         else if (is.null(stk)) rec else rec[0L, , drop=FALSE]
  sub <- sub[order(sub$year), , drop=FALSE]
  col <- stock_pal[((si - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
  lbl <- if (!is.null(stk)) stk else "Recruitment"
  p   <- plot_ly()
  if ("lwr" %in% names(sub) && any(!is.na(sub$lwr)))
    p <- add_ribbons(p=p, x=sub$year, ymin=sub$lwr, ymax=sub$upr,
      line=list(width=0), fillcolor="rgba(44,160,44,0.2)",
      showlegend=FALSE, hoverinfo="skip")
  if (nrow(sub) > 0)
    p <- add_lines(p=p, x=sub$year, y=sub$est,
      line=list(color=col, width=2), name=lbl, showlegend=FALSE,
      hovertemplate=paste0(lbl, " %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
  rec_sh <- list()
  if (!is.null(mv$sr_params$R0))
    rec_sh <- list(list(type="line", x0=min(years), x1=max(years),
      y0=mv$sr_params$R0, y1=mv$sr_params$R0,
      line=list(color="#999999", width=1.5, dash="dash")))
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$yaxis$title     <- "Recruitment"
  lay$yaxis$rangemode <- "tozero"
  lay$shapes <- rec_sh
  do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
}

.glance_hr <- function(stk, si) {
  has_stk <- !is.null(stk)
  p <- plot_ly()
  if (!is.null(mv$landed_catch_total)) {
    ct   <- mv$landed_catch_total
    ct_s <- if (has_stk && "stock" %in% names(ct)) ct[ct$stock==stk, , drop=FALSE] else ct
    if (nrow(ct_s) > 0)
      p <- add_bars(p=p, x=ct_s$year, y=ct_s$est,
        marker=list(color="rgba(200,200,200,0.4)"), name="Catch",
        yaxis="y2", showlegend=FALSE,
        hovertemplate="Catch %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  }
  if (!is.null(hr)) {
    hr_fls <- if ("fleet" %in% names(hr)) unique(hr$fleet) else "fleet"
    for (fi in seq_along(hr_fls)) {
      fl   <- hr_fls[fi]
      hr_f <- if ("fleet" %in% names(hr)) hr[hr$fleet==fl, , drop=FALSE] else hr
      if (has_stk && "stock" %in% names(hr_f)) hr_f <- hr_f[hr_f$stock==stk, , drop=FALSE]
      if (!has_stk && "stock" %in% names(hr_f) && length(unique(hr_f$stock)) > 1L) {
        hr_f <- aggregate(est ~ year, data=hr_f, FUN=mean)
        hr_f$fleet <- fl
      }
      hr_f <- hr_f[order(hr_f$year), , drop=FALSE]
      if (nrow(hr_f)==0) next
      if ("lwr" %in% names(hr_f) && any(!is.na(hr_f$lwr)))
        p <- add_ribbons(p=p, x=hr_f$year, ymin=hr_f$lwr, ymax=hr_f$upr,
          line=list(width=0), fillcolor="rgba(31,119,180,0.2)",
          showlegend=FALSE, hoverinfo="skip")
      hr_c <- stock_pal[((fi - 1L) %% length(stock_pal)) + 1L]
      p <- add_lines(p=p, x=hr_f$year, y=hr_f$est,
        line=list(color=hr_c, width=2),
        name=if(length(hr_fls) > 1L) fl else hr_label,
        showlegend=(!has_stk && length(hr_fls) > 1L),
        hovertemplate=paste0(fl, " %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"))
    }
  }
  hr2 <- mv$harvest_rate_secondary
  if (!is.null(hr2)) {
    hr2_lbl <- if (!is.null(meta$hr_secondary_label)) meta$hr_secondary_label else "Secondary harvest rate"
    p <- add_lines(p=p, x=hr2$year, y=hr2$est,
      line=list(color="#ff7f0e", width=2, dash="dash"),
      name=hr2_lbl, showlegend=!has_stk,
      hovertemplate=paste0(hr2_lbl, " %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>"))
  }
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title     <- "Year"
  lay$yaxis$title     <- hr_label
  lay$yaxis$rangemode <- "tozero"
  lay$yaxis2 <- list(overlaying="y", side="right", title="Catch", showgrid=FALSE)
  lay$shapes  <- hr_shapes
  lay$barmode <- "overlay"
  do.call(layout, c(list(p=p), lay))
}

if (!is.null(sb_stks)) {
  # Multi-stock: n_stk columns × 3 rows (SB / Rec / HR)
  sb_pans  <- lapply(seq_along(sb_stks), function(i) .glance_sb(sb_stks[i], i, TRUE))
  rec_pans <- lapply(seq_along(sb_stks), function(i) .glance_rec(sb_stks[i], i))
  hr_pans  <- lapply(seq_along(sb_stks), function(i) .glance_hr(sb_stks[i], i))
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(c(sb_pans, rec_pans, hr_pans), list(
    nrows = 3, shareX = TRUE, titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
    heights = c(0.4, 0.3, 0.3), margin = 0.04
  )))
  p_out <- layout(p=p_out, showlegend = !is.null(mv$vulnerable_biomass))
} else {
  # Single-stock: original 3-panel stack
  p_sb  <- .glance_sb(NULL, 1L, FALSE)
  p_sb  <- layout(p=p_sb, showlegend=TRUE)
  p_rec <- .glance_rec(NULL, 1L)
  p_hr  <- .glance_hr(NULL, 1L)
  p_hr  <- layout(p=p_hr, showlegend=!is.null(mv$harvest_rate_secondary))
  p_out <- subplot(p_sb, p_rec, p_hr, nrows=3, shareX=TRUE,
    titleX=TRUE, titleY=TRUE, heights=c(0.4, 0.3, 0.3), margin=0.04)
  p_out <- layout(p=p_out, showlegend=TRUE)
}
modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
```

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### All Biomass Components

```{r all_bio, eval=is.null(meta$model_type) || meta$model_type != "siscaL"}
sb      <- mv$spawning_biomass
bio_stks <- if ("stock" %in% names(sb) && length(unique(sb$stock)) > 1L) unique(sb$stock) else NULL
bio_pal  <- c("#d62728", "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#9467bd")

.bio_panel <- function(stk, si) {
  has_stk <- !is.null(stk)
  p <- plot_ly()

  # Spawning biomass
  sub_sb <- if (has_stk) sb[sb$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else sb
  sub_sb <- sub_sb[order(sub_sb$year), , drop = FALSE]
  if ("lwr" %in% names(sub_sb) && any(!is.na(sub_sb$lwr)))
    p <- add_ribbons(p = p, x = sub_sb$year, ymin = sub_sb$lwr, ymax = sub_sb$upr,
      fillcolor = "rgba(214,39,40,0.15)", line = list(width = 0),
      legendgroup = "Spawning", showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip")
  p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub_sb$year, y = sub_sb$est,
    line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 2), name = "Spawning",
    legendgroup = "Spawning", showlegend = (!has_stk || si == 1L),
    hovertemplate = "Spawning %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")

  # Total biomass
  if (!is.null(mv$total_biomass)) {
    tb     <- mv$total_biomass
    has_tb_stk <- "stock" %in% names(tb) && length(unique(tb$stock)) > 1L
    sub_tb <- if (has_stk && has_tb_stk) tb[tb$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else tb
    sub_tb <- sub_tb[order(sub_tb$year), , drop = FALSE]
    p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub_tb$year, y = sub_tb$est,
      line = list(color = "#d62728", width = 2, dash = "dot"), name = "Total",
      legendgroup = "Total", showlegend = (!has_stk || si == 1L),
      hovertemplate = "Total %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  }

  # Legal biomass
  if (!is.null(mv$legal_biomass)) {
    lb     <- mv$legal_biomass
    has_lb_stk <- "stock" %in% names(lb) && length(unique(lb$stock)) > 1L
    sub_lb <- if (has_stk && has_lb_stk) lb[lb$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else lb
    sub_lb <- sub_lb[order(sub_lb$year), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sub_lb) > 0)
      p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub_lb$year, y = sub_lb$est,
        line = list(color = "#1f77b4", width = 2), name = "Legal",
        legendgroup = "Legal", showlegend = (!has_stk || si == 1L),
        hovertemplate = "Legal %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  }

  # Sublegal biomass
  if (!is.null(mv$sublegal_biomass)) {
    slb     <- mv$sublegal_biomass
    has_slb_stk <- "stock" %in% names(slb) && length(unique(slb$stock)) > 1L
    sub_slb <- if (has_stk && has_slb_stk) slb[slb$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else slb
    sub_slb <- sub_slb[order(sub_slb$year), , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sub_slb) > 0)
      p <- add_lines(p = p, x = sub_slb$year, y = sub_slb$est,
        line = list(color = "#ff7f0e", width = 2), name = "Sublegal",
        legendgroup = "Sublegal", showlegend = (!has_stk || si == 1L),
        hovertemplate = "Sublegal %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
  }

  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$xaxis$title <- "Year"
  lay$yaxis$title <- "Biomass"
  lay$updatemenus <- mv_log_linear_buttons()
  if (has_stk) lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = stk))
  do.call(layout, c(list(p = p), lay))
}

if (!is.null(bio_stks)) {
  bio_pans <- lapply(seq_along(bio_stks), function(i) .bio_panel(bio_stks[i], i))
  p_out <- do.call(subplot, c(bio_pans, list(
    nrows = 1L, shareX = TRUE, shareY = FALSE,
    titleX = TRUE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
  )))
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, showlegend = TRUE)
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
} else {
  p_out <- .bio_panel(NULL, 1L)
  p_out <- layout(p = p_out, showlegend = TRUE)
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)
}
```
